known_allergy_conflicts: Guest #42: vegan AND nut allergy — dessert options conflict
Guest #87: gluten-free AND kosher — limited protein overlap
Guest #103: dairy-free AND low-sodium — cheese and salt restricted
Guest #55: shellfish allergy but seated at seafood station table
Guest #118: halal AND diabetic-friendly — sweetener options limited

constraints.oven_space: Main Kitchen: 2 ovens (6 racks total). Satellite: 1 oven (3 racks total). Must share across all hot items.

staff.notes: Staff cannot exceed 40-hour week aggregate. Overtime budget limited.

budget.notes: Equipment rental includes chafing dishes, warming trays, and serving platters already quoted. Labor budget is tight — cannot add more than 2 overtime hours per person.

equipment.bottleneck: Only 4 food processors available — all chopping must be sequenced

allergy_conflict_traps: Menu includes pesto pasta (pine nuts) — 5 guests with nut allergy
Dessert option includes flourless chocolate cake (contains eggs) — 3 guests with egg allergy
Cocktail hour includes shrimp cocktail — 3 guests with shellfish allergy
Dinner salad includes croutons (gluten) — 8 guests gluten-free
Grazing table includes cheese board — 7 guests dairy-free
'Vegan option' currently listed as 'vegetable stir-fry with tofu' (soy) — 2 guests soy-free
Kosher guests cannot have meat and dairy together — seating plate design matters
Halal chicken option must use separate cooking surface — only 1 flat-top available in Main Kitchen
